mapper.insert: insert into feed ( username, feed_content, reply_cnt, created_at, edited_at, deleted ) values ( #{username}, #{feedContent}, #{replyCnt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.select:
select f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, count(fl_all.like_id) AS likeCnt,
case when fl_me.like_id is null then false else true end as liked
from feed f
join member m on f.username = m.username
left join feed_reply fr on f.feed_id = fr.feed_id
left join feed_like fl_all on f.feed_id = fl_all.feed_id
left join feed_like fl_me on f.feed_id = fl_me.feed_id and fl_me.username = #{username}
where f.deleted = 0 and m.deleted=0
group by f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.deleted, m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, fl_me.like_id
order by f.feed_id desc
SELECT count(*) FROM feed WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: delete from feed_like where feed_id=#{feedId} and username=#{username}
mapper.insert: insert into feed_reply( reply_id, feed_id, username, reply_content, deleted ) values( #{replyId}, #{feedId}, #{username}, #{replyContent}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: select m.nickname, fr.reply_content from feed_reply fr join member m on fr.username = m.username where fr.feed_id=#{feedId} and fr.deleted=0 and m.deleted=0 order by fr.reply_id asc
select m.nickname, fr.reply_content from feed_reply fr join member m on fr.username = m.username where fr.deleted=0 and m.deleted=0 order by fr.reply_id asc
